name: FeiyuTech Scorp Mini 2 with Combo Kit
description: For photography enthusiasts, the array of available equipment often caters to distinct requirements and finding a gimbal that adequately suits a range of equipment can be challenging.

features.Key Features :: Work with Smartphone, GoPro 12/11/10, Compact Camera and Mirrorless | Built-in AI Tracking Module | L-shaped Quick Release System | 1.2kg Payload | 852g Lightweight Design | Rapid Vertical Installation | 1.3" OLED Touchscreen & Upgraded Joystick Control | Cable & Bluetooth Control Supported
